title: Tablecraft H1433T Measuring Cup Measure-N-Pour, 4 oz, Clear
description:
About this item
Don’t mess up your measurements! Our measuring cups ensure your recipes turn out tasting great.
H1433T Measure-N-Pour includes measurement markings in Tbsp, Tsp, oz & mL.
2½ x 2½ x 3¼"
reviews_5s:
I accidentally through away the cup that comes with liquid NyQuil. When I saw this I thought yes, great, it is the perfect solution.

I really love that the measurements are easy to read. It shows ounces from .5-4.0, ml from 10-120, Tbsp from 1-8 and tsp from 3-24. With all that it can be used when measuring liquids for recipes too. I never really thought of that before. I always thought of these small measuring cups as medicine cups.

The only down side to it is it says handwashing only. That isn’t a detterant to me. It only takes a few seconds to wash a small item like this and I’m not sure but I think it’s to protect the lettering.Nicely made, lots of measuring options, has a good, hefty feel to it.I gift this item all the time. It is helpful for making cocktails, baking, and cooking. It helps quickly measure small amounts of liquids without using a bunch of measuring spoons. The writing holds up well even after repeated dishwashing.This a great small sized measuring cup.
It showes tablespoons, teaspoons, ounces and ml. It is made of thick glass that should not easily break as my other did when I dropped it.We love making cocktails, and this 4oz measuring glass is perfect for adding our favorite spirits/mixers to a cocktail shaker.I am not a bartender so this is so helpful to make different drinks. Quality is good !I try to have at least 2 of these on hand. 1 is for drinking just a small amount, e.g., milk with a sandwich. The 2nd is for measuring. A handy size. If I break 1, I immediately order another.Great for quick cleaningReceived quick and as described.Tablecraft H1433T Measuring Cup Measure-N-Pour, 4 oz, Clear. I ordered 2 of these because I need more of these shot glass measuring cups. I love these because they have 4 different types of measurements, oz, ml, tablespoon & teaspoon. I love the red lines but I could use thicker red lines to see better. Sometimes we use these when we taste tests new drinks.
4-22-24
reviews_1s:
Play Video
Inaccurate markings. I was purchasing it for a friend who is a baker, as a gift. I refused to give her something that’s not accurate. The glass is not very clear. I’m returning it. Out of the three items I ordered from Akers, two of them are inaccurate.The 4oz mark is on the rim of the glass and smudged. Also, there are red smudge marks in the middle of the glass. It's not worth the effort to return it. As always, you get what you pay for.This product fails at its only purpose: measuring small amounts of liquid. The measuring lines are printed too high along the side of the glass. For comparison, I have included a photo of this glass alongside one purchased from bed bath and beyond. I filled both with 1 oz of water and added red food coloring to show the liquid in each glass. The glass on the left is the one purchased through Amazon. The glass on the right is the one purchased at bed bath and beyond.The printing for the measurement's is misprinted on mine by about a 1/4 inch.. It makes the measurements wrong for every metric on the glass. In to the trash.I purchased this particular measuring device because there were so many positive reviews. There is a review however with photos, showing the variance in the measuring accuracy. I needed this for medication. Anyone that is using this for medication, you are not taking enough medicine. This measuring device measures considerably short of the correct measure. Very disappointing.Do not use this with boiling water. Mine cracked right in half. Get yourself a better product. The print is hard to read, which doesn't help matters much, either.Measurements are already missing straight out of the package.The measurements are so small and light, very hard to read

Don’t buy this productThe measurement lines are not accurate: 4 ounce line is actually 5 ounces. On the glass received, it was accurate at 1 ounce, but from there up to 4 ounces it is inaccurate.Not as pictured. NOT as advertised.
I was expecting what I saw in the ad. NO !
It’s silicone NOT glass
